reference: Hi, my girlfriend and I are really worried right now because when we were having sexual intercourse last night, the condom broke and I did not notice, so I ejaculated inside her. The condom was a Trojan spermicide type, and she has also been taking birth control for about a year, and she never misses a pill. She also cleaned herself thoroughly after it happened. Should we be worried about pregnancy?
text: Hi, my girlfriend and I are really worried right now because when we were having sexual intercourse last night, the condom broke and I did not notice, so I ejaculated inside her.
